_note: Final gallery ROI crops actually shipped on the page. Values are ffmpeg-style [x0, y0, x1, y1] in the 1920x1080 master-render pixel space. Feed as crop=W:H:X:Y to tools/encode_video.sh (W=x1-x0, H=y1-y0, X=x0, Y=y0). Regenerate a fresh box for a new clip with tools/compute_roi.py; these were then hand-nudged so no agent gets clipped.
